session.user: Run the following command and report results: ``` uv run pytest tests/commands/workspace/create/ -v ```
session.assistant: I'll execute the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on workspace create command tests

session.assistant:
pytest passed: All 48 tests in the workspace create command suite passed in 1.00 seconds.
**Summary:** - 48 passed - 0 failed - 0 skipped
The test suite covers: - Basic creation functionality - Branch conflict handling - Branch source selection - Branch switching logic - Graphite integration - Naming and validation - Output modes - Plan file operations - Post-create hooks - Remote validation
